notes: Examine.com evidence summary on deep breathing; covers HRV, blood pressure, parasympathetic activation, and stress reduction
2022 systematic review and meta-analysis of voluntary slow breathing on HRV: 223 studies; significant increases in vagally-mediated HRV at all time points
Scientific Reports 2023 meta-analysis of RCTs: breathwork significantly reduces stress (g = -0.35); even single sessions produce measurable effects
